sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54311" key="kataktupe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατακτῠπ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n54311.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make a loud noise, roar against</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κατεκτύπουν ἡμῶν οἱ ἄνεμοι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:1:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.23</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
